Font Mockups

UI fonts, in-game messages, and wordmark options

1. UI Fonts (Score, Labels, HUD)

Space Grotesk
12,450 SCORE Level 7
Modern, geometric, excellent number rendering
Inter
12,450 SCORE Level 7
Industry standard, super crisp at all sizes
Outfit
12,450 SCORE Level 7
Friendly, rounded, modern
Lexend
12,450 SCORE Level 7
Designed for readability, wide spacing
DM Sans
12,450 SCORE Level 7
Clean geometric, Google's go-to
Sora
12,450 SCORE Level 7
Futuristic, techy feel
Manrope
12,450 SCORE Level 7
Semi-condensed, fits more info
Rubik
12,450 SCORE Level 7
Slightly rounded, friendly but professional

2. In-Game Messages (Combo, Level Up, Fire, Excellent)

Bebas Neue
COMBO x5
FIRE!
Bold, impactful, classic game feel
Teko
COMBO x5
LEVEL UP!
Condensed, energetic, modern esports
Russo One
EXCELLENT!
LOOP UNLOCKED
Bold, geometric, arcade vibes
Righteous
COMBO x5
FIRE!
Retro-futuristic, smooth curves
Black Ops One
LEVEL UP!
COMBO x5
Military/tactical, aggressive
Staatliches
EXCELLENT!
LOOP UNLOCKED
Condensed display, newspaper headline
Anton
COMBO x5
FIRE!
Ultra bold, high impact
Orbitron
LEVEL UP!
COMBO x5
Sci-fi, techy, futuristic
Audiowide
EXCELLENT!
LOOP UNLOCKED
Wide, tech, perfect for audio/music theme
Bungee
COMBO x5
FIRE!
Chunky, playful, cartoon game
Lilita One
LEVEL UP!
COMBO x5
Fun, bouncy, casual game feel
Fugaz One
EXCELLENT!
FIRE!
Italic, speed, dynamic energy

Pacifico
SongSugar
Fun, retro, beach vibes
Lobster
SongSugar
Bold script, very readable
Dancing Script
SongSugar
Elegant, flowing, energetic
Satisfy
SongSugar
Smooth, modern script
Kaushan Script
SongSugar
Brush-style, handwritten feel
Permanent Marker
SONGSUGAR
Marker pen, graffiti style
Caveat
SongSugar
Casual handwriting, approachable
Great Vibes
SongSugar

Sacramento
SongSugar
Monoline script, clean
Yellowtail
SongSugar
Vintage script, 50s feel
Courgette
SongSugar
Medium weight, very legible
Playball
SongSugar
Baseball card style, retro
Cookie
SongSugar
Sweet, playful, rounded
Allura
SongSugar
Formal calligraphy, premium
